message:
refactor(conformance,ndarray): migrate serde_yaml to serde_yaml_ng; pass window_shape by reference

- Replace deprecated serde_yaml 0.9 with serde_yaml_ng 0.10 across all 9
  evidence pack generators, contract_schema, and security_contracts
- Change sliding_window_view to accept &[usize] instead of Vec<usize> in
  fnp-ndarray and update all call sites in conformance harness
- Update .gitignore: track .beads/ directory, add .beads_recovery_*/ and
  .beads/*.rebuild_* exclusion patterns
- Add ufunc benchmark baseline JSON artifacts for regression tracking
- Add .beads/ local issue tracker state (config, issues, metadata)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+# Database
+*.db
+*.db-journal
+*.db-shm
+*.db-wal
+
+# Lock files
+*.lock
+
+# Temporary
+last-touched
+*.tmp
+
+# Local history backups
+.br_history/
+
+# Sync state (local-only, per-machine)
+.sync.lock
+sync_base.jsonl
+
+# Merge artifacts (temporary files from 3-way merge)
+beads.base.jsonl
+beads.base.meta.json
+beads.left.jsonl
+beads.left.meta.json
+beads.right.jsonl
+beads.right.meta.json
+
+# Daemon runtime files
+daemon.lock
+daemon.log
+daemon.pid
+bd.sock
+sync-state.json
+
+# Worktree redirect file
+redirect
+
+# bv (beads viewer) lock file
+.bv.lock

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Beads Project Configuration
+# issue_prefix: franken_numpy
+# default_priority: 2
+# default_type: task

@@ -5,9 +5,6 @@ target_*/

-.beads/
-

 # Beads history snapshots

@@ -89,4 +87,5 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*

@@ -414,7 +414,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fnp-ufunc",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
- "serde_yaml",
+ "serde_yaml_ng",

 ]
 
@@ -1241,10 +1241,10 @@ dependencies = [
 ]
 
 [[package]]
-name = "serde_yaml"
-version = "0.9.34+deprecated"
+name = "serde_yaml_ng"
+version = "0.10.0"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "6a8b1a1a2ebf674015cc02edccce75287f1a0130d394307b36743c2f5d504b47"
+checksum = "7b4db627b98b36d4203a7b458cf3573730f2bb591b28871d916dfa9efabfd41f"
 dependencies = [
  "indexmap",
  "itoa",

@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ asupersync = { version = "0.2.5" }
 base64 = "0.22.1"
 serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0.149"
-serde_yaml = "0.9.34"
+serde_yaml_ng = "0.10.0"
 sha2 = "0.10.9"
 
 [dev-dependencies]
